meta.title: Cashu for WooCommerce
meta.description: Try the plugin in a disposable WordPress + WooCommerce sandbox.
meta.author: robwoodgate

steps.code: <?php require_once 'wordpress/wp-load.php'; if ( function_exists( 'wc_get_products' ) && ! wc_get_products( array( 'limit' => 1 ) ) ) { $p = new WC_Product_Simple(); $p->set_name( 'Sample T-Shirt' ); $p->set_regular_price( '19.99' ); $p->set_description( 'A test product to try Cashu checkout.' ); $p->set_short_description( 'Demo product.' ); $p->set_status( 'publish' ); $p->set_catalog_visibility( 'visible' ); $p->save(); }
